channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Monthly / Devs
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Devs (Monthly, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Monthly #1 — March 2026 · Devs Edition
item.description: This month, GitHub Copilot's agentic capabilities matured across every developer surface — IDEs, CLI, code review, and the coding agent. Agent hooks, shared memory, and a new agentic architecture for code review give developers more programmable control over AI-assisted workflows, while GPT-5.4 and bidirectional MCP integrations expand what agents can accomplish autonomously.
